2123410.name: Seven Dwarfs: Legends Untold
2123410.description:
Seven Dwarfs: Legends Untold is an epic co-op roguelike set in a dark fantasy realm, centered on intense, action-packed combat. Join forces with a team of up to 4 players, each taking on the role of one of the 7 dwarf warriors, each with unique abilities. Embark on a quest through a kingdom dominated by the ominous presence of the Evil Queen, where darkness and fear reign. Work together to overcome adversaries and ancient, powerful creatures. Upgrade your character with mighty weapons and spells, and reclaim the Kingdom from the grip of darkness.

A DARK REALM TO EXPLORE AND FEARLESS ENEMIES TO ENCOUNTER

Travel through the vast and captivating biomes of the Kingdom, and face hordes of different enemies. Experience epic battles against a set of diverse, powerful dark entities, full of unique challenges.

WORK TOGETHER TO SAVE THE KINGDOM

Experience the fantastic world designed to bring you and up to three friends together in an epic fight. Harness the individual skills of your team members and work together in complex assaults on the enemy.

NO NEED TO BE A SKILLED SWORDSMAN TO START YOUR QUEST

With easy to pick-up controls, you and your friends are ready to embark on an epic quest. But be warned: only the bravest and most determined Dwarfs are likely to succeed, as the path ahead is filled with danger and challenges.

GROW ALONGSIDE YOUR FELLOW DWARFS AND ASCEND TO LEGEND

Embark on an epic journey through challenging levels, battling enemies and collecting Souls to strengthen your characters. But be warned—you only have one chance as a team. If you fall, you'll start from the beginning, so work together, strategize, and make every move count!
2123410.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
